description: Triggers for resume formatting, layout cleanup, and structural consistency

queries.query: My resume formatting is inconsistent — clean it up
Standardize the date formats and bullet styles in my resume
Convert my two-column resume layout to single-column ATS-friendly format
Fix the spacing and visual inconsistencies in my resume
My resume has mixed fonts and inconsistent bold — format it professionally
Audit my resume formatting and give me a corrected version
Remove the graphics and tables from my resume for ATS compatibility
My resume is 3 pages — help me format it to fit into 1-2 pages properly
Ensure my resume has consistent section headers and visual hierarchy
Format my resume for submission to a conservative financial services firm
Rewrite my resume bullets to show impact and metrics
Optimize my resume keywords for ATS screening
Tailor my resume for a specific PM role
Add a professional summary section to my resume
Quantify my resume achievements with better numbers
Write an executive resume for a VP Engineering role
Create a creative visual resume for my design portfolio
Manage multiple resume versions for different applications
Translate my skills from military to civilian language
Write a cover letter for this job application
